invariants.CRTV-0: Append-only: snapshots never mutate once written
invariants.CRTV-CHAIN-0: Every snapshot carries prev_hash; genesis prev_hash == GENESIS_HASH
invariants.CRTV-GATE-0: Rollback is fail-closed; any error raises ConstitutionalRollbackError
invariants.CRTV-AUDIT-0: Every rollback/snapshot flushed to append-only JSONL before return
